---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the use case or pain point. (e.g. "I have a hard time finding tasks I created last week...")

**Proposed solution**
What would the ideal experience look like?

**Alternatives you've considered**
Other approaches or workarounds you've tried.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other apps, etc.
